creator: remmmy2004@yahoo.co.uk
text:
Below is the error report encountered when making URL requests while
browsing. Browsing is painfully slow at this time. Please advise.

"The requested URL could not be retrieved

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

While trying to retrieve the URL: http://www.yahoo.com/r/m5 

The following error was encountered: 

Unable to determine IP address from host name for www.yahoo.com 
The dnsserver returned: 

No DNS records 
This means that: 

 The cache was not able to resolve the hostname presented in the URL. 
 Check if the address is correct. 
Your cache administrator is webmaster@skannet.com. 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generated Thu, 06 Feb 2003 08:39:40 GMT by proxy.skannet.com (squid/2.5.STABLE4)"

Counting on you for a prompt response.

Remi,
SKANNET, Ilorin, Nigeria.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
